No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to eradicating poverty.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course directly aims to 'strengthen cardiopulmonary function,' 'enhance muscle fitness,' and promote 'healthy and safe behavior patterns,' strongly aligning with Target 3.4 for preventing non-communicable diseases.
